EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMapServerEx

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to members for a MapService.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3F6E8D1D-8ECA-4E9F-8F9B-0B1E1B8F3D9C")]
public interface IMapServerEx : IMapServer
